chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-2999 of 2019 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For hearing of main case. 15.01.2025 Ms.Riffat Mubeen, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr.M.Kamran Khan, A.A.G. Mr.Samiullah Shah, Advocate for Respondent No.4. Ms.Sara Malkani, Assistant Attorney General. ---- This petition has been filed by 38 individuals seeking remuneration pursuant to land acquisition for the Lyari Express Way project. Learned A.A.G. states that there is no impediment in payment of dues to rightfully entitled individuals. The petitioners remain at liberty to prefer an application in such regard. Learned A.A.G. further states that any such application shall be determined expeditiously after providing an opportunity of hearing to the respective applicants. Learned A.A.G. further states that in view of the aforesaid, this petition may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
